articles.title: Garmin (GRMN) Launches AXIS Flight Displays To Expand Its Avionics Reach
articles.summary: Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) has introduced its new AXIS integrated flight display family for aircraft. The AXIS line adds new display hardware with built-in navigation, radio, and audio panel functions. The system is designed for both certified and experimental aircraft, targeting OEM and retrofit markets.
